chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT MIRPURKHAS Civil Revision Application No.S-06 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A No.75/2026. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Tahir, advocate for the applicants. Mr. Agha Iftekhar Hussain, advocate for private respondents. Mr. Muhammad Shareef Solangi, Assistant A.G Sindh. = After arguing the matter at some length, both the learned counsel agreed that instant civil revision application may be disposed of with direction to the learned trial court to decide the F.C Suit No.182/2023 in accordance with law after recording evidence of the parties within 90 days from the receipt of this order. Order accordingly. In view of the above and by consent of the learned counsel, the impugned Judgment dated 19.12.2025 passed by learned Additional District Judge-II, Tando Adam is upheld and Civil Revision Application is disposed of by consent of the parties with direction to the learned trial court to decide the case after recording evidence, within a period of 90 days from the date of receipt of this Order, whereby no unnecessary adjournment shall be granted to any of the parties. The instant revision application is disposed of alongwith listed application in above terms. JUDGE *Faisal*
